title: New International Fellow 2025: Dr Zhong Lin Wang FREng - YouTube
text:
My name is Jon Wong. I'm a reg professor
and high chair emmeritus from Georgian
Institute of Technology director of
Beijing Institute of Nano Energy Nano
System. I'm very honored to be elected
as international fellow for the Royal
Academy for Engineering. This is a great
recognition to my work and to my uh
contribution to science and engineering.
In the last three decades, we have made
two major fields. Number one, use a piso
electric or trouble electric effect for
energy haring. We call
pis electric and a trouble electric nano
generator.
This field has brought over 20,000
people to follow us do energy harvesting
because its applications in the wearable
electronics, sensing, internet of things
as well as healthc care and
environmental protection.
Second, my contribution is to invention
of pisctric
effectdriven
transistor which called pisotronics.
This has application in power
electronics
as well as electric automobiles.
Those two fields are new and have a
longlasting impact to human
sustainability.
I hope through my effort can promote the
research and education program in the
UK, in the world and abroad. I also hope
use this two food can train more young
people who can do creative work that can
contribute to the energy and the sensing
for the world. Thank you very much.
